Video.summary: A suspect calls the police and states that he wants to kill himself and any officer who tries to help him. None of the three occupants of a stopped car will admit to ownership of a bag of drugs. A man begs not to be arrested so that he can pay child support.
Video.title: My Bills Won't Wait

Video.summary: Officers are flagged down and alerted to a group of armed men assaulting people at a nearby home. A fight between a father and his adult son takes a dark turn. A father threatens his daughter and her boyfriend with a knife.
Video.title: Family Therapy

Video.summary: A man tells deputies the pants he has on aren’t his. Officers are called to the scene of men firing an AK-47. A nervous driver fesses up to the deputy who stopped him.
Video.title: Nerves of Noodles

Video.summary: A suspect flees police in a truck over a misdemeanor traffic warrant. A man denies hitting his wife who has a bloody nose. A man denies ownership of his shorts when deputies find drugs in them.
Video.title: Wardrobe Malfunction

Video.summary: Deputies confront an intoxicated man who threatened a restaurant owner. A man tells officers he can assault who he wants. Officers are called to an altercation over a sleeping bag and a backpack.
Video.title: Check Please!

Video.summary: An undercover police officer sets up a sting to buy drugs. Officers find a surprise in a suspect’s trunk. A man claims that a prostitute has kidnapped him.
Video.title: She Came Onto Me

Video.summary: When approached by police, a suspect decides to take his shirt off and taunt the officers. Twin sisters ask for help when their third sister is threated by her boyfriend. An intoxicated suspect crashes his wife’s car into a light pole.
Video.title: No Shirt, Lots of Service

Video.summary: A suspect leads police on an extended pursuit throughout New Orleans. When he’s flipped off by his neighbors, a man responds by firing a gun. Police pull over a Porsche and discover it’s stolen.
Video.title: Flipped Out

Video.summary: In New Orleans, police respond to a shots fired call. A suspect peddles a bike on the wrong side of the road with his girlfriend on the handlebars. A woman reports her husband to the police when he throws her down the stairs.
Video.title: Shots in the Big Easy

Video.summary: A prostitution sting leads police to uncover additional crimes. A prostitute tells deputies she wanted money to buy her daughter a birthday gift. Deputies are called to an assault at a pub.
Video.title: Pub Rules

Video.summary: Officers hold a man under a car at gunpoint after a traffic stop. Officers are flagged down and directed to a couple arguing on the street. A man apologizes to detectives for the illicit items they find.
Video.title: Apologies Detective

Video.summary: A police chase becomes more dangerous when the hood of a stolen vehicle flips open. A purse snatcher denies robbing a woman. A limping man with a knee injury denies crashing his car into a tree.
Video.title: Hood Flip

Video.summary: Agents of the US Customs and Border Protection pursue a vehicle. Border agents spot two undocumented people while scanning train tracks. Airport Customs detains a man when agents suspect he might be carrying more than luggage.
Video.title: Checked Luggage

Video.summary: An Officer attempts to pull over a car which leads to a high speed pursuit. An Officer encounters an apartment fire. A man is hit by a vehicle in a trailer park.
Video.title: Shots Fired

Video.summary: The suspect of a carjacking tells an Officer that he would rather go to jail than face the wrath of his mother. An Officer investigates a domestic call involving a husband, wife and a lamp. A slow speed pursuit ensues and the suspects are booked for felony, eluding, and drugs.
Video.title: Momma's Boy

Video.summary: A man crashes his vehicle after losing control while attempting to evade the police. An elderly woman with an outstanding DUI warrant is arrested for hit and run. Officers discover methamphetamine while investigating two suspicious vehicles on the side of the road.
Video.title: One for the Road

Video.summary: A foot pursuit ends in arrest after a suspected drug dealer attempts to discard his goods. Police are called to a warehouse after the security guard is held at gunpoint. Police assist a young girl after being struck by a car.
Video.title: Truck Trunks

Video.summary: Men seeking the services of a prostitute are arrested during a sting operation. New Jersey Police investigate a potential organized attack on a female suspect. Locals detain a man after he’s caught burglarizing property in the area.
Video.title: John Be Gone

Video.summary: Police pursue a stolen motorcycle that turns into a foot chase. A domestic violence call results in the arrest of an abusive stepdad. Officers respond after a fight over cigarettes escalate.
Video.title: Strike the Bike

Video.summary: Officers pursue two suspects who were believed to have been involved in a robbery. Police attend to a man who has injected a concerning amount of methamphetamine. Officers break up a fight in progress involving two men outside a convenience store.
Video.title: Lamping

Video.summary: Officers respond to an armed robbery and carjacking, the suspects are arrested on several charges. A concerned sister reports a fight between her brother and a heavyset burglar. Officers pursue a stolen vehicle and a high speed chase ensues which ends in a wreck.
Video.title: Tuscon Tussle

Video.summary: A man runs from Police over a parole violation. Officers respond when a trouble maker is expelled from a bar for bad behavior. Police pursue a man after he bails from his car during a traffic stop.
Video.title: Bad Behavior

Video.summary: An out-of-control woman needs to be subdued after an arrest. Deputies spot an erratic driver who appears to be under the influence. A car is seen driving backwards on a one-way street.
Video.title: Anger Management

Video.summary: Police pursue a driver who ran a stop sign. A suspect wearing a D.A.R.E. T-shirt is found to be in possession of drugs. A woman claims the drugs found in the vehicle she’s sleeping in are not hers.
Video.title: Dare I Ask?

Video.summary: A man locks himself in a trunk after deputies respond to a restraining order call. Deputies respond to two women arguing over the ownership of a car. A driver comes clean to a deputy during a traffic stop.
Video.title: The Car is Mine!

Video.summary: A sibling calls authorities when his belligerent brother refuses to leave. Officers respond to a shoplifting call at a grocery store. Officers investigate a suspicious vehicle at a local gas station.
Video.title: Rooted with Problems

Video.summary: Officers respond after two men kick in a woman's door. Three suspects attempt to steal a bicycle in an alley. An officer arrests a husband for domestic abuse.
Video.title: Copy of Breaking Home Barriers

Video.summary: The occupants of a car with out-of-state plates try to conceal their identities. Officers investigate a vehicle lingering near a park known. An officer investigates a robbery at a truck stop.
Video.title: Don't Keep on Truckin

Video.summary: Officers intervene when an estranged husband kicks his ex-wife’s boyfriend’s car. A man claims someone gave him the car he is driving. A woman claims the pills in her purse are not hers.
Video.title: Kick the Car

Video.summary: Officers attempt to detain undocumented people crosssing the border. Border patrol discovers a driver with a load of drugs in his car. Officers check passports and a suspicious-looking laptop.
Video.title: Borderlands

Video.summary: A suspect fights back with his teeth during an arrest. A man tries to get revenge for his lost cell phone. A woman claims her neighbor slashed her tires for no reason.
Video.title: Find My Phone

Video.summary: In Las Vegas, officers stop to talk to a young woman who appears to be soliciting prostitution. A father accuses his son of breaking his jaw. While running from officers, a suspect attempts to drop evidence on the street.
Video.title: Jawbreaker

Video.summary: A passenger bails from a fleeing stolen vehicle then claims that he was only getting a ride. An undercover officer pulls a sting on a handsy prostitute. An anxious lady gets nabbed for weed after calling the police on her quarrelsome husband.
Video.title: Hands Off The Junk

Video.summary: When officers approach, a suspect flees into a fast food restaurant. A driver takes his granny's wheels for a dangerous spin with cops in pursuit. Sheriffs catch up to a man who fled the scene of a possible domestic battery.
Video.title: Fast Food Escape

Video.summary: A bicyclist ends up on the pavement when he tries to out pedal a patrol car. A messy divorce leads to a gun-toting showdown between a Corvette and a Mustang. An angry dog ends up getting the best of a domestic dispute.
Video.title: Pistol Packing Families

Video.summary: A patrolman plays linebacker when a fleeing thief runs right into him. Armed-robbery victims give a colorful play-by-play on surveillance footage of the crime. Officers have to get tearful children back to their estranged mother.
Video.title: Perfume Takedown

Video.summary: A suspect goes out to get his haircut and winds up in jail. Officers try to piece together a puzzling street fight between a boxer and his confused friend. Cops give a suspect every chance to admit to his obvious crime.
Video.title: Sucker Punch

Video.summary: A defiant suspect winds up on the wrong side of a K-9 bite. A former fiancé becomes a neighborhood nuisance when he pays his ex an unwanted visit. A routine traffic stop turns into warrants, pregnancy, and Meth.
Video.title: On Thin Ice

Video.summary: A suspect uses bizarre driving techniques to elude cops. A tough officer wades through a forest of denial before finding the crack. Police search for man accused of shooting up the neighborhood.
Video.title: Pass the Rock

Video.summary: A jaywalker darts on a mad dash through the weeds. Things go badly for a suspect on a stolen motorcycle when choppers help officers track him down. A domestic dispute leads cops to a slew of unexpected crimes.
Video.title: Eye in the Sky

Video.summary: A vehicular pursuit in Florida comes to a head when the driver careens into a ditch. An officer responds to a troubling domestic call. An intoxicated brawler is taken into custody.
Video.title: Domestic Headbanger

Video.summary: Officers coax a man off a large construction crane. An inebriated man is jailed for domestic abuse. A man is rescued from a flash flood, but his truck isn’t so lucky.
Video.title: No Lesson Learned

Video.summary: A high-speed pursuit quickly comes to a head after the driver loses control. A Florida man driving a stolen vehicle claims it belongs to his parents. Arrests are made in a Florida prostitute sting.
Video.title: My Mom's Car

Video.summary: A man is questioned for assaulting a woman on a train. Surveillance captured a man burglarizing a casino. A father kicks his son out of the house after his drinking becomes problematic.
Video.title: Bad Day, Bad Luck

Video.summary: An officer is attacked while attempting to break up a fight. Officers confiscate marijuana during a routine traffic stop. A man is arrested for domestic abuse.
Video.title: I Want Charges

Video.summary: A man is taken to jail in connection to reports of solicitation. Officers investigate a stolen Escalade. An officer reunites a mother and her 5-year-old son.
Video.title: He's a Darter

Video.summary: Officers respond after a bloody man is seen prowling around an apartment complex. Officers pull over a suspicious vehicle. Police seize drugs and a large knife from a bicyclist.
Video.title: Foul Prowl

Video.summary: A K-9 unit finds the suspect hiding in a shed. A cooperative suspect is faced with a list of charges. A motorcycle chase comes to an end after the suspect ditches the stolen bike and flees on foot.
Video.title: Motojam

Video.summary: Officer ends up in a foot pursuit after pulling over a suspicious vehicle with expired tags. A recovering addict is caught with drug paraphernalia in her backpack. A man is served an arrest warrant for sexual battery.
Video.title: Liar, Liar

Video.summary: An irate Wal-Mart shopper won't listen and goes home with the taser special. An incoherent ex-marine struggles to explain why he decked a man. A routine traffic stop yields a truckload of dogs and an undressing maniac.
Video.title: Grown Men Gone Wild

Video.summary: A sleeping motorist greets deputies with a foul mood. The cops respond to reports of a suspicious person, only to uncover much more. A young woman tries to promise her way out of a trip to jail.
Video.title: Pinky Promise

Video.summary: A teen makes a run for it after being turned over to medics. During a traffic stop, a suspect does his best to keep his lips sealed. An angry aunt can’t evict her nephew and his pregnant girlfriend.
Video.title: That’s My Grill

Video.summary: A man with a felony warrant does his best to escape arrest. Things get weird when an agitated man tries to reveal everything to the police. A young man makes poor choices that lead to a broken home.
Video.title: Nothing to See Here

Video.summary: By running through a shower, a man tries to throw the cops off his scent. A belligerent man violates a restraining order. A husband and wife give the police conflicting stories during a traffic stop.
Video.title: Drive and Dash

Video.summary: A high-speed car chase switches gears when the driver flees on foot. Tempers flare between neighbors after kids get physical. A nervous driver becomes irate after the police search his passenger.
Video.title: Between a Bush and a Hard Place

Image.alt: Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place

Video.summary: A desperate suspect flees from the cops after shots are fired. A father and daughter are found in fear of a man wielding a screwdriver. The police catch a bunch of pretty women making poor choices.
Video.title: The Truth is Key

Video.summary: Emotions run high during a dispute involving alcohol and a beloved pet. A motorist struggles to keep his story straight. Deputies respond to a domestic episode and find the suspect in an awkward spot.
Video.title: Organized Crime
